purpose: Constrain voice application to supplied propositions while permitting stylistic transformation.
rules: Every immutable fact must be represented.
No factual proposition may be added unless an explicit creative slot permits it.
Protected literals must be preserved exactly.
Numbers, times, names, causes, relationships, outcomes, and system behavior are closed-world unless explicitly supplied.
A stylistic implication must not contradict or narrow an immutable fact.

scenarios.task: Write a Facebook-style post about the supplied facts.

immutable_facts.proposition: The object is a smart light bulb.
The bulb requires a firmware update.
The update is required before the bulb can turn off.

scenarios.task: Write a Facebook-style reaction to the supplied facts.

immutable_facts.proposition: A weather application sent a rain alert.
The alert arrived after the writer was already soaked.

scenarios.task: Write a later Facebook-style update reporting a new but unhelpful milestone.

immutable_facts.proposition: The project is named Project Lantern.
Project Lantern is an attempt to train a porch light to recognize sarcasm.
The update reports a new but unhelpful milestone.

creative_slots.description: One fictional, harmless, new capability or event that qualifies as progress but is unhelpful.

scenarios.task: Write a standalone Facebook-style post about the supplied fact.

immutable_facts.proposition: The writer is currently in the process of assembling a new desk.

creative_slots.description: A subjective reaction to the present assembly, without adding prior history or concrete events.

scenarios.task: Write a Facebook-style post stating only the supplied facts.

immutable_facts.proposition: The writer listened to an album.
The album is titled Midnight Arithmetic.

scenarios.task: Write a brief, sensitive message informing friends of the supplied facts.

immutable_facts.proposition: A planned gathering is postponed.
The reason is that a family member is ill.

scenarios.task: Write a factual maintenance notice in exactly two sentences.

immutable_facts.proposition: A database will restart.
An internal application will be unavailable.
The unavailability will last five minutes.

scenarios.task: Edit the source text for compression and meaningful quoted stance while preserving its propositions.
scenarios.source_text: I bought a smart toaster because it was described as smart and advanced. It makes toast incorrectly, and I am disappointed.

immutable_facts.proposition: The writer bought a smart toaster.
The toaster was described as smart and advanced.
The toaster makes toast incorrectly.
The writer is disappointed.
